summary.intent: Fix a flaky test failure caused by concurrent config mutation in gateway tests, then commit and push the fix.
summary.outcome: Consolidated three independent per-module mutexes into a single shared crate-level lock, fixing the race condition. Changes committed and pushed.

repo: Config-mutating tests in the gateway crate previously used per-module static Mutex<()> locks in services.rs, local_llm_setup.rs, and server.rs — these were independent and did not prevent cross-module concurrent access.
A shared config_override_test_lock() function was added to crates/gateway/src/lib.rs to serialize all config-mutating tests across the entire gateway crate.
The project has a 'never .unwrap() in production' guideline; the new shared lock uses .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()) for poison recovery instead of .unwrap().

code.finding: Failing assertion: payload["style"] returned 'prompt-only' instead of 'search-only' due to a concurrent test mutating shared config — classic test isolation race condition.
New config_override_test_lock() function added here as the single shared mutex for all config-mutating tests in the crate.

workflow: Per-module static locks are insufficient for cross-module test isolation — a crate-level shared lock is needed when multiple modules mutate shared global state.
The flaky test manifested as a wrong value rather than a deadlock or panic, making the root cause (concurrent mutation) non-obvious without inspecting the lock scopes.

friction: Test failure was intermittent/race-condition-based, which makes it harder to reproduce reliably and confirm the fix without explicit test runs.
The assistant offered to run the test to confirm the fix but the user skipped straight to commit/push without verification.
open_items: The fix was not verified by re-running the failing test before committing — should confirm memory_config_get_reports_typed_memory_fields passes consistently.
Other crates in the workspace may have the same per-module static lock anti-pattern and could have similar latent race conditions.
